title: Settings
subtitle: Personal preferences, integrations, and app state.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Controls how the interface looks across every page.

data.title: Danger zone
data.clearTestDataDesc: Clears form fields and results in Load Test, E2E Smoke, and Request Debug. Your connection library and appearance preferences are kept.
data.clearTestDataWarning: This clears every page's form fields and test results across Load Test, E2E Smoke, and Request Debug. Your connection library and appearance settings are kept.
data.resetStateDesc: Removes every connection, every form value, and local preferences, restoring the initial state.
data.resetWarning: This deletes every connection, every form value, theme, and locale preference. Are you sure?

page.title: Notification channels
page.subtitle: Manage Slack / Feishu / DingTalk / Generic Webhook channels and their subscriptions
